---
title: "SRRM2 52nt Multiple Sequence Alignment"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    fig.width = 14,
    fig.height = 12
)
```

# Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}
# Load packages
# Load ggplot2 first to ensure compatibility
library(ggplot2)
# Load ggtree after ggplot2
library(ggtree)
library(ape)
library(ggmsa)
library(ggnewscale) # For new_scale_color() to add multiple color scales

assign(
    "is.waive",
    ggforce:::is.waive,
    envir = .GlobalEnv
)
```

# Define File Paths

```{r define-paths}
# Base WSL path
base_wsl_path <- "\\\\wsl.localhost/Ubuntu/home/mikej10/advbfx"

# Directory containing extracted files
extracted_dir <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "intronretention", "extracted_regions")

# Reference directory
ref_dir <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "reference", "phastCons100way")

# 100-way 52nt alignment FASTA file (RNA version with common names)
srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta <- file.path(extracted_dir, "100way52ntSRRMI12_RNA_commonNames.fa")

# Phylogenetic tree file (using common names version)
tree_file <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "intronretention", "hg38.100way.commonNames.nh")

# Tree to clade mapping file (pre-computed mapping)
tree_clade_mapping_file <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "intronretention", "tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv")

# SpliceAI predictions file
spliceai_file <- file.path(base_wsl_path, "intronretention", "SRRM2", "spliceinfsrrm2.tsv")

# Missing species (those not present in the FASTA file)
missing_species <- c(
    "allMis1", "amaVit1", "anaPla1", "anoCar2", "apaSpi1", "araMac1", "astMex1",
    "colLiv1", "danRer10", "falChe1", "falPer1", "ficAlb2", "fr3", "gadMor1",
    "galGal4", "gasAcu1", "geoFor1", "hapBur1", "latCha1", "lepOcu1", "macEug2",
    "mayZeb1", "melGal1", "melUnd1", "neoBri1", "oreNil2", "ornAna1", "oryLat2",
    "pelSin1", "petMar2", "pseHum1", "punNye1", "sarHar1", "taeGut2", "takFla1",
    "tetNig2", "xenTro7", "xipMac1", "zonAlb1"
)
```

# 100-Way 52nt Alignment with Highlighted Regions

```{r srrm2-intron12-100way-52nt-alignment-highlighted, fig.height=12}
# Create base alignment
p <- ggmsa(
    srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta,
    char_width = 0.6,
    seq_name = TRUE,
    consensus_views = TRUE,
    color = "Chemistry_NT"
)

# Get the number of sequences
seq_data <- readLines(srrm2_intron12_100way_52nt_fasta)
seq_count <- sum(grepl("^>", seq_data))

cat("Number of sequences in 100-way 52nt alignment:", seq_count, "\n")

# Add highlighting rectangles
# First highlight: positions 10-14
# Second highlight: positions 40-44
p <- p +
    annotate("rect",
        xmin = 10 - 0.5, xmax = 15 + 0.5,
        ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
        alpha = 0.2, fill = "yellow", color = "orange", linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    annotate("rect",
        xmin = 40 - 0.5, xmax = 45 + 0.5,
        ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
        alpha = 0.2, fill = "cyan", color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    annotate("text",
        x = 12.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "208-213",
        color = "darkorange", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
    ) +
    annotate("text",
        x = 42.5, y = seq_count + 0.5, label = "238-243",
        color = "darkblue", fontface = "bold", size = 3.5
    )

print(p)
```

# Phylogenetic Tree with Highlighted Missing Species

```{r phylogenetic-tree, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
# Load tree to clade mapping (pre-computed)
tree_clade_map <- read.table(
    tree_clade_mapping_file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    quote = "",
    comment.char = ""
)

# Read the phylogenetic tree (using common names)
tree <- read.tree(tree_file)

# Create lookup for tree names to clades/species_id
tree_name_to_clade <- setNames(tree_clade_map$clade, tree_clade_map$tree_name)
tree_name_to_species_id <- setNames(tree_clade_map$species_id, tree_clade_map$tree_name)

# Map tree tip labels to clades using the pre-computed mapping
tip_to_clade <- tree_name_to_clade[tree$tip.label]
tip_to_species_id <- tree_name_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
names(tip_to_clade) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_to_species_id) <- tree$tip.label

# Map missing species IDs to tree names for highlighting
missing_tree_names <- character()
for (species_id in missing_species) {
    matches <- tree_clade_map$tree_name[tree_clade_map$species_id == species_id & tree_clade_map$species_id != ""]
    if (length(matches) > 0) {
        missing_tree_names <- c(missing_tree_names, matches)
    }
}

# Load SpliceAI predictions
spliceai_data <- read.table(
    spliceai_file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    quote = "",
    comment.char = "",
    strip.white = TRUE
)

# Clean species_id (remove leading/trailing whitespace) and remove any empty rows
spliceai_data$genome_name <- trimws(spliceai_data$genome_name)
spliceai_data <- spliceai_data[spliceai_data$genome_name != "" & !is.na(spliceai_data$genome_name), ]

# Create lookup: species_id -> max_donor_prob (using genome_name column)
species_to_spliceai <- setNames(spliceai_data$max_donor_probability, spliceai_data$genome_name)

# Map spliceai data to tree names via species_id
# First, get species_id for each tree tip
tip_species_ids <- tip_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
tip_spliceai_signal <- species_to_spliceai[tip_species_ids]
names(tip_spliceai_signal) <- tree$tip.label

# Format spliceai signal for display (round to 4 decimal places, leave NA as blank)
tip_spliceai_label <- ifelse(
    is.na(tip_spliceai_signal),
    "",
    sprintf("%.4f", tip_spliceai_signal)
)

# Create data frame for tip labels with missing status, clade, and spliceai signal
tip_data <- data.frame(
    label = tree$tip.label,
    clade = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    species_id = as.character(tip_to_species_id),
    missing = tree$tip.label %in% missing_tree_names,
    group = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    spliceai_signal = tip_spliceai_signal,
    spliceai_label = tip_spliceai_label,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
tip_data$group[is.na(tip_data$group) | tip_data$group == ""] <- "Unknown"

# Create tip labels with spliceai annotation (leave blank if no spliceai data)
tip_data$tip_label_with_spliceai <- ifelse(
    tip_data$spliceai_label == "" | is.na(tip_data$spliceai_label),
    tip_data$label,
    paste0(tip_data$label, " (", tip_data$spliceai_label, ")")
)

# Define color scheme for clades
clade_colors <- c(
    "Primate" = "#d95f02",
    "Euarchontoglires" = "#1b9e77",
    "Laurasiatheria" = "#7570b3",
    "Afrotheria" = "#e7298a",
    "Mammal" = "#66a61e",
    "Aves" = "#e6ab02",
    "Sarcopterygii" = "#a6761d",
    "Fish" = "#666666",
    "Unknown" = "gray50"
)

# Get MRCA nodes for each clade (needed for plots)
clade_nodes <- list()
unique_clades <- unique(tip_data$group[tip_data$group != "Unknown"])
for (clade_name in unique_clades) {
    clade_species <- tip_data$label[tip_data$group == clade_name]
    if (length(clade_species) >= 2) {
        clade_node <- ape::getMRCA(tree, clade_species)
        clade_nodes[[clade_name]] <- clade_node
    }
}
```

# Plot 1: Colored tips and branches by clade

```{r plot1-colored-branches, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
p1 <- ggtree(tree, layout = "slanted", aes(color = group)) %<+% tip_data +
    theme_tree2() +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = clade_colors,
        name = "Clade",
        na.value = "gray50"
    ) +
    new_scale_color() +
    geom_tiplab(aes(color = missing, label = tip_label_with_spliceai), size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE, offset = 0.001) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"), guide = "none")

print(p1)
```

# Plot 2: Background highlighting by clade

```{r plot2-background-highlight, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
p2 <- ggtree(tree, layout = "slanted") %<+% tip_data

# Add background highlighting for each clade
highlight_colors <- c(
    "Primate" = "#d95f02",
    "Euarchontoglires" = "#1b9e77",
    "Laurasiatheria" = "#7570b3",
    "Afrotheria" = "#e7298a",
    "Mammal" = "#66a61e",
    "Aves" = "#e6ab02",
    "Sarcopterygii" = "#a6761d",
    "Fish" = "#666666"
)

# Add highlights
for (clade_name in names(clade_nodes)) {
    if (clade_name %in% names(highlight_colors)) {
        p2 <- p2 + geom_hilight(
            node = clade_nodes[[clade_name]],
            fill = highlight_colors[[clade_name]],
            alpha = 0.2
        )
    }
}

# Add tip labels colored by missing status with spliceai annotation
p2 <- p2 + geom_tiplab(aes(color = missing, label = tip_label_with_spliceai), size = 2.5, show.legend = FALSE, offset = 0.001) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "black", "TRUE" = "red"))

print(p2)
```

Summary

```{r summary-info}
cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Total species in tree:", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("Species with clade mappings:", sum(!is.na(tip_to_clade) & tip_to_clade != ""), "\n")
cat("Missing species (highlighted in red):", sum(tip_data$missing), "\n")
cat("Species present in FASTA:", sum(!tip_data$missing), "\n")
cat("\n=== SpliceAI Predictions ===\n")
cat("Species with SpliceAI predictions:", sum(!is.na(tip_data$spliceai_signal)), "\n")
cat("Species without SpliceAI predictions:", sum(is.na(tip_data$spliceai_signal)), "\n")
if (sum(!is.na(tip_data$spliceai_signal)) > 0) {
    cat("Mean SpliceAI signal:", sprintf("%.4f", mean(tip_data$spliceai_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Max SpliceAI signal:", sprintf("%.4f", max(tip_data$spliceai_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Min SpliceAI signal:", sprintf("%.4f", min(tip_data$spliceai_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
```
